title: Pottery Perfection
description: Polishes up the decorated pot's textures to better match terracotta
body:
Pottery Perfection is a resoucepack that aims to make all pottery consistent with the terracotta block, plus some redesigns to sherds.

**By default this pack makes it so pots without sherds still have a trim around them, if you prefer the blank pots, simply download the [Untrimmed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pottery-perfection-untrimmed) version of the pack!**

![Display of the new pottery textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6acb628e9c723b35d93720b3b5e76ee6d6f3073.png)
